question.label: Support needs
question.name: What support from me would make the biggest difference in your work right now?
question.description: Investigates how the manager can better support James's work and priorities.

assessment.note: James's response of 'nothing' indicates a lack of engagement with the idea of receiving support, suggesting disengagement.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Future growth
new_queue.name: What skills or experiences are you looking to develop next?

history.answer_excerpt: i am worried about my health
